hero.imageAlt: A sprawling, high-end luxury apartment living room with expansive floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking a sunset cityscape.
hero.title: Redefining the Modern Sanctuary.
hero.lead: Precision-engineered transformations for the most discerning homeowners. We blend architectural rigor with tactile warmth to create living spaces that inspire.
portfolio.title: The Portfolio.
portfolio.desc: A curated selection of our most complex and rewarding apartment transformations across the city's premier addresses.
portfolio.card1.title: The Obsidian Penthouse
portfolio.card1.imageAlt: Minimalist master bedroom with integrated oak headboard and recessed warm LED lighting.
portfolio.card2.title: Industrial Refinement
portfolio.card2.imageAlt: Modern kitchen island crafted from honed black marble with dark walnut cabinetry.
portfolio.afterImageAlt: Same kitchen space after luxury renovation.
portfolio.detail1.imageAlt: Custom plaster wall with integrated recessed shelving.
portfolio.detail2.imageAlt: Renovated bathroom with floating oak vanity and walk-in shower.
portfolio.detail3.imageAlt: Sophisticated dining room with solid wood table and sculptural lighting.
craft.imageAlt: Craftsman's hands working on custom architectural joinery.
craft.label: THE CRAFT
craft.title: Architecture at the scale of furniture.
craft.lead: We believe the difference between a house and a home lies in the millimeter. Our team of master craftsmen and architects collaborate to ensure every joint, every surface, and every shadow is intentional.
craft.bullet1.title: Technical Precision
craft.bullet1.desc: Engineering-grade documentation for every phase of construction.
craft.bullet2.title: Sourcing Excellence
craft.bullet2.desc: Global access to rare stone, sustainably harvested timber, and bespoke hardware.
cta.bgImageAlt: Material mood board with marble, oak and brass.
cta.title: Ready to evolve your space?
cta.lead: Your vision, executed with uncompromising standards. Let's discuss your next project.
footer.blurb: Elevating the standard of residential renovation through architectural integrity and master craftsmanship.
footer.copyright: © 2024 ARCH&CO Renovation Excellence. All rights reserved.
about.text: ARCH&CO is a residential renovation studio focused on precision, materials and architectural integrity. From full gut renovations to bespoke millwork, we partner with discerning homeowners to transform apartments into calm, contemporary sanctuaries.
pricingPage.hero.title: Structured Excellence. Transparent Pricing.
pricingPage.hero.lead: Transforming your space shouldn't be a mystery. We've refined our process into three distinct stages, backed by clear investment tiers to help you plan your dream renovation with confidence.
pricingPage.hero.imageAlt: A high-end modern kitchen renovation featuring premium walnut cabinetry, a massive marble island, and architectural pendant lighting.
pricingPage.journey.title: The Renovation Journey
pricingPage.journey.lead: From the first handshake to the final walkthrough, we manage every detail of your transformation.
pricingPage.journey.step1.title: 01. Consultation
pricingPage.journey.step1.desc: An in-depth analysis of your space, lifestyle needs, and aesthetic goals. We define the project scope and feasibility.
pricingPage.journey.step2.title: 02. Design
pricingPage.journey.step2.desc: Our architects create detailed 3D renderings and material boards, ensuring every texture and layout is perfected before build.
pricingPage.journey.step3.title: 03. Execution
pricingPage.journey.step3.desc: White-glove construction management. We handle all permits, vendors, and craftsmanship to bring the vision to life.
pricingPage.tiers.title: Project Benchmarks
pricingPage.plan1.title: Studio Renovation
pricingPage.plan1.desc: Full cosmetic overhaul focused on space-optimization, premium flooring, and modern lighting.
pricingPage.plan2.title: 2-Bedroom Flat
pricingPage.plan2.desc: Comprehensive structural and cosmetic updates, including kitchen and master bath redesigns.
pricingPage.plan3.title: Luxury Penthouse
pricingPage.plan3.desc: Bespoke architectural interventions, premium stone masonry, and integrated smart-home systems.
pricingPage.standard.title: The ARCH & CO Standard
pricingPage.standard.lead: Every project, regardless of tier, includes our premium management suite to ensure a stress-free transformation.
pricingPage.standard.row1.label: Insured & Licensed
pricingPage.standard.row2.label: On-Time Guarantee
pricingPage.standard.card1.title: Architectural Oversight
pricingPage.standard.card1.desc: Dedicated architect assigned to your project from start to finish to maintain design integrity.
pricingPage.standard.card2.title: Permit Procurement
pricingPage.standard.card2.desc: We handle the entire bureaucracy, from city filings to historical board approvals.
pricingPage.standard.card3.title: Concierge Sourcing
pricingPage.standard.card3.desc: Direct access to our exclusive network of stone, wood, and fixture suppliers at trade pricing.
pricingPage.standard.card4.title: Post-Build Warranty
pricingPage.standard.card4.desc: A 24-month comprehensive craftsmanship warranty for total peace of mind after you move in.
pricingPage.final.title: Ready to redefine your space?
pricingPage.final.lead: Schedule a 30-minute discovery call with our principal designer to discuss your vision and receive a preliminary project estimate.
pricingPage.footer.blurb: Modern architectural renovations for the discerning homeowner. Precision in every detail.
contactPage.hero.title: Transforming your vision into structured reality.
contactPage.hero.lead: Our team of architectural experts is ready to discuss your next renovation project. We focus on precision, luxury, and lasting quality.
contactPage.trust1.title: Certified Craftsmen
contactPage.trust1.desc: Every renovation is executed by master builders with over 15 years of high-end residential experience.
contactPage.trust2.title: 5-Year Warranty
contactPage.trust2.desc: We stand by our precision. All structural work is covered under our comprehensive gold-standard warranty.
contactPage.office.label: Office
contactPage.direct.label: Direct

contactPage.banner.title: Experience the transformation.
